notes:
vMLX 1.5.60

Highlights:
- MiniMax-M3 vision (VL) end-to-end, multi-turn image conversations (latest image replaces prior, no blending).
- MiniMax-M3 ~2.4x decode speedup via bf16 residual cast (sustained 23-29 tok/s, coherent).
- MiniMax-M3 MSA dual-cache forced paged (rescue); cache UI shows only M3-applicable options.
- Phase-1 cache policy (paged off by default, SSD prefix default); JANG Tier-1 family fallback.

Verification:
- Notarized + stapled compat arm64 DMG from source commit de9b39609; Gatekeeper accepted; bundled vmlx_engine 1.5.60.
- M3 VL multi-turn + speed proven live in the dev-build app (25-37 tok/s, retained history).
